items.name: theme-hud
items.title: HUD Theme
items.description: Dark sci-fi ops theme: monochrome + orange accent, radius 0, condensed sans + terminal mono.

items.name: theme-hud-cyan
items.title: HUD Theme — Cyan Accent
items.description: Cyan accent override for the HUD theme. Install after theme-hud; warnings and destructive tones stay warm.

items.name: hud-button
items.title: HUD Button
items.description: Corner-clipped primary, outline, ghost, destructive variants. Condensed uppercase.

items.name: hud-panel
items.title: HUD Panel
items.description: Card panel with optional orange corner brackets, header/content/footer.

items.name: status-badge
items.title: Status Badge
items.description: Square mono badges: engaged / priority / patrol / standby / critical (+ blinking dot).

items.name: telemetry-bar
items.title: Telemetry Bar
items.description: 3px labelled progress bar with mono label/value row.

items.name: segment-bar
items.title: Segment Bar
items.description: Segmented capacity indicator.

items.name: hud-kbd
items.title: Kbd
items.description: Keyboard shortcut chip.

items.name: hud-skeleton
items.title: HUD Skeleton
items.description: Skeleton block with fixed-width shimmer clipped inside each block.

items.name: radar
items.title: Radar
items.description: Sector-scan radar with rotating sweep. Decorative by default; accepts polar `blips` ({angle, distance, hot}) to plot real data.

items.name: hud-label
items.title: HUD Label
items.description: Mono uppercase micro-label for form fields.

items.name: hud-input
items.title: HUD Input
items.description: Terminal-style text input: mono, square, focus ring in accent.

items.name: hud-textarea
items.title: HUD Textarea
items.description: Terminal-style textarea with optional live character counter (showCount + maxLength).

items.name: hud-switch
items.title: HUD Switch
items.description: Square 36x18 switch with accent thumb when checked.

items.name: hud-checkbox
items.title: HUD Checkbox
items.description: Square checkbox with solid accent fill marker.

items.name: hud-radio-group
items.title: HUD Radio Group
items.description: Circular radio with solid accent dot.

items.name: hud-select
items.title: HUD Select
items.description: Dark popover select: accent top edge, 2px accent active rail, diamond marker.

items.name: hud-tabs
items.title: HUD Tabs
items.description: Underline tabs: condensed uppercase, 2px accent indicator.

items.name: hud-alert
items.title: HUD Alert
items.description: Directive/critical alert strip with icon glyph and tinted border.

items.name: hud-dialog
items.title: HUD Dialog
items.description: Corner-bracketed modal with header/body/footer and mono close glyph.

items.name: hud-sheet
items.title: HUD Sheet
items.description: Side drawer panel: 280px, hairline dividers, mono accent title.

items.name: hud-tooltip
items.title: HUD Tooltip
items.description: Dark mono tooltip with arrow.

items.name: hud-context-menu
items.title: HUD Context Menu
items.description: Right-click menu: mono rows, shortcut hints, destructive variant.

items.name: hud-sonner
items.title: HUD Toaster
items.description: Sonner toast stack in HUD style: accent left rail, glyph icons.

items.name: hud-command
items.title: HUD Command
items.description: Command palette (cmdk): > prompt, accent active rail, hint footer.

items.name: hud-table
items.title: HUD Table
items.description: Data table shell: mono micro-headers, deep row borders, selected tint.

items.name: hud-pagination
items.title: HUD Pagination
items.description: 26px square page buttons with accent active state.

items.name: hud-chip
items.title: HUD Chip
items.description: Removable filter/tag chip in mono uppercase.

items.name: hud-accordion
items.title: HUD Accordion
items.description: Bordered accordion with rotating caret and hairline dividers.

items.name: hud-breadcrumb
items.title: HUD Breadcrumb
items.description: Mono breadcrumb trail with caret separators, accent current page.

items.name: hud-avatar
items.title: HUD Avatar
items.description: Square initials avatar with status dot and rank bars.

items.name: hud-slider
items.title: HUD Slider
items.description: 2px track slider with diamond thumbs; supports ranges.

items.name: hud-popover
items.title: HUD Popover
items.description: Dark bordered popover surface.

items.name: hud-input-otp
items.title: HUD Input OTP
items.description: 38x44 code cells with accent active border and blinking caret.

items.name: hud-calendar
items.title: HUD Calendar
items.description: Mono grid calendar with accent selection and range tint.

items.name: hud-gauge
items.title: HUD Gauge
items.description: Masked conic-gradient ring gauge with numeric readout.

items.name: hud-sparkline
items.title: HUD Sparkline
items.description: Inline SVG sparkline driven by a values array.

items.name: hud-line-chart
items.title: HUD Line Chart
items.description: Dependency-free SVG time-series plot: multi-series with dash-pattern separation, axis grid, caution band, direct end-labels and a hover crosshair readout.

items.name: hud-bar-chart
items.title: HUD Bar Chart
items.description: Dependency-free categorical bar chart: vertical or horizontal, grouped series with 2px surface gaps and per-bar hover readout.

items.name: hud-heatmap
items.title: HUD Heatmap
items.description: Accent-tinted intensity matrix (values 0–1).

items.name: hud-timeline
items.title: HUD Timeline
items.description: Audit-log timeline with diamond markers and connector rail.

items.name: hud-tree
items.title: HUD Tree
items.description: Hierarchical nav tree with accent selection rail.

items.name: hud-dropzone
items.title: HUD Dropzone
items.description: Dashed drop target with accent hover and file input.

items.name: hud-stepper
items.title: HUD Stepper
items.description: Multi-step indicator: done/active/todo squares with connectors.

items.name: hud-typography
items.title: HUD Typography
items.description: Heading scale H1-H6 + body: condensed sans headings, mono overline/micro labels, accent index and tick.

items.name: dot-globe
items.title: Dot Globe
items.description: Interactive dotted earth globe (canvas): drag to rotate, wheel to zoom, markers with incident state. Land dots derived from Natural Earth (public domain).

items.name: crew-card
items.title: Crew Card
items.description: Personnel card: portrait, name/callsign, rank ticks, assignment, status and vitals/duty telemetry. Portrait is supplied via the photo prop — no images ship with this item.
